creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

| The full text of the PR can be found at:
| http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137617

2009/8/11 Stanley Chan wrote:
> When I install ImageMagick on the FreeBSD 7.2 machine, the following problems coccur:
> ===> Registering installation for libgpg-error-1.7
> ===> Returning to build of libgcrypt-1.4.4
> Error: shared library "gpg-error.0" does not exist
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/security/libgcrypt.

I could not reproduce your problem.
It looks something might have gone wrong while building
security/libgpg-error.

Could you please delete libgpg-error-1.7 and start over again?


Regards,
-- 
end

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  umq@ueo.co.jp
